name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2004 Category A4 - Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Flaws
description: This is a category grouping weaknesses related to the A4 category in the OWASP Top Ten 2004, covering cross-site scripting flaws including improper neutralization of input during web page generation and HTTP header scripting syntax. Categories are informal organizational groupings and are prohibited for vulnerability mapping since 2019.
